wreaths.title: White wreath
wreaths.full_desc: A delicate and airy decorative wreath, handcrafted from flexible grapevine and painted a pure white. This piece serves as an elegant accent for any modern interior, adding a sense of lightness, freshness, and a festive mood to the space. It makes an ideal base for creating your own seasonal arrangements or stands beautifully on its own as a minimalist decoration.

wreaths.title: Brown wreath
wreaths.full_desc: Aesthetic interior wreath, made exclusively from natural ecological materials. Its deep brown and wood shades will add a special coziness, warmth and harmony with nature to your home. Textured base made of grapevine.
features: Purpose: for wall, door or fireplace decoration

wreaths.title: Straw wreath
wreaths.full_desc: Authentic eco-wreath made of selected natural straw. Its natural golden hue fills the home with sunlight, summer warmth and comfort. Dense and neat weaving makes this wreath a reliable basis for creativity, as well as a self-sufficient element of decor in the style of country, Provence or Scandinavian minimalism.

wreathsCollected.title: Spring wreath
wreathsCollected.full_desc: A bright and cheerful spring wreath that instantly transforms the space and creates an atmosphere of awakening nature. The composition harmoniously combines delicate greenery, primroses and elegant floral accents. This decor is ideal for decorating a home for the Easter holidays or simply to add juicy colors and freshness to the interior.
features: Material: premium textile flowers, artificial greenery, natural base
Fastening: has a neat loop for hanging

wreathsCollected.title: Peony wreath
wreathsCollected.full_desc: A luxurious and romantic wreath filled with the lush beauty of blooming peonies. The composition harmoniously combines full-blossomed pink and cream peony heads, delicate buds, and rich greenery. This exquisite decor is ideal for creating a warm, elegant atmosphere in your interior, bringing a touch of endless summer and floral sophistication to your home.
features: Material: premium textile peonies, mixed greenery, natural base
Fastening: has a neat loop for hanging

wreathsCollected.title: Summer wreath
wreathsCollected.full_desc: A luxurious summer wreath that has absorbed all the beauty and warmth of the sunny season. The composition is created from imitation of bright wildflowers, lush green grasses and spikelets, symbolizing abundance and harmony. This wreath will become a wonderful summer amulet for your home, will fill the room with the energy of the sun and create an incredibly cozy, hospitable atmosphere.
features: Material: high-quality textile materials, decorative berries, eco-base
Theme: Summer, purple cotton, ethnic style
Care: easy cleaning from dust with a dry brush or hairdryer on cold mode

wreathsCollected.title: Autumn wreath
wreathsCollected.full_desc: An incredibly cozy autumn wreath, made in warm crimson, gold and copper tones. The composition harmoniously combines realistic multi-colored leaves, small pumpkins. This decor will bring the atmosphere of golden autumn to your home, warm the interior with its colors and will become a wonderful decoration on the eve of the November season and cozy evenings with tea.
features: Material: premium quality textile leaves, decorative mini pumpkins, straw base

wreathsCollected.title: Winter wreath
wreathsCollected.full_desc: A fabulous winter wreath that will bring the atmosphere of a snowy forest and a Christmas miracle to your home. The base of thick cast needles looks as realistic as possible, does not crumble and is gently dusted with artificial frost. The composition is decorated with white winter berries and silver accents. This wreath will be the perfect Christmas talisman for your door or holiday table.
features: Material: premium quality cast needles (environmentally friendly and safe), winter bird, eco-decor
Effect: light snowfall (artificial snow that does not crumble)

wreathsCollected.title: Rose pink wreath
wreathsCollected.full_desc: An incredibly delicate and sophisticated romantic wreath, created for those who love delicate pastel accents. The composition consists of luxurious silk roses of powdery pink shades that look like they are alive, and is complemented by small inflorescences and soft greenery. Such a wreath will be a wonderful addition to the interior of the bedroom, living room or an exquisite decor for festive events, photo zones and gifts.
features: Material: premium textile roses, decorative greenery, reliable base

wreathsCollected.title: Cotton wreath
wreathsCollected.full_desc: An incredibly cozy and textured wreath, featuring airy natural cotton bolls as its centerpiece. Soft white accents blend harmoniously with the natural base, creating a sense of warmth, purity, and tranquility. This wreath is a perfect example of modern Scandinavian style or 'hygge' decor; it suits any season beautifully and adds a touch of softness to your interior.
features: Material: 100% natural cotton, dried twigs, eco-friendly base
Benefits: hypoallergenic materials, retains its appearance over time

wreathsCollected.title: Burgundy peony wreath
wreathsCollected.full_desc: A deep wreath with lush burgundy peonies. This composition catches the eye thanks to the rich wine shade of the petals and the realistic texture of premium flowers. The wreath is harmoniously complemented by dark greenery and thin branches, which creates a voluminous, rich look. It will become a bold and elegant accent in the interior, adding a touch of luxury and sophistication to it.
features: Material: premium quality textile peonies, decorative branches, natural base
Color: deep burgundy, wine, dark green

wreathsCollected.title: Hortensia wreath
wreathsCollected.full_desc: A luxurious and voluminous interior wreath, the main decoration of which is incredibly lush hydrangea inflorescences. Due to the increased diameter of 40 cm, this product looks extremely impressive and can become the central element of the decor in your living room, hallway or on the front door. The delicate texture of the petals and the harmonious combination of shades create a feeling of freshness of a blooming garden.
features: Material: realistic silk hydrangeas, decorative greenery, vine base
Purpose: for spacious rooms, large doors or festive photozones

wreathsCollected.title: Prettiness wreath
wreathsCollected.full_desc: An incredibly cute and charming decorative wreath, the name of which speaks for itself. This composition is created to bring a smile and add a special elegance to the space. It harmoniously combines delicate small berries and light green accents on a strong natural base. An ideal choice for refreshing the interior or making a pleasant, aesthetic gift to a loved one.
features: Material: premium quality combined berries, floral decor, natural vine
Style: Quartra, Shabby chic, Modern romance
Feature: universal pastel a design that fits any season

wreathsCollected.title: Eucalyptus wreath
wreathsCollected.full_desc: An interior wreath made entirely of lush eucalyptus branches. Its noble matte green-ash shade looks extremely fresh and modern. This composition will fit perfectly into minimalist spaces, Scandinavian interiors or lofts. The wreath adds natural lightness and sophisticated aesthetics to the room, while remaining a discreet and elegant accent.
features: Material: high-quality 3D eucalyptus (maximum texture realism), solid base

wreathsCollected.title: Esthetic wreath with dried flower
wreathsCollected.full_desc: An incredible work of floristic art is a large aesthetic wreath made of natural dried flowers. Thanks to its solid diameter of 40 cm and weightless, airy structure, it looks like a real interior painting. The composition is woven from delicate dried flowers, spikelets and natural herbs that retain their beauty for years without requiring care.
features: Material: 100% natural stabilized dried flowers, cereal herbs, vine base
The advantage: timeless decor that will never fade or lose its relevance

wreathsCollected.title: Winter wood wreath
wreathsCollected.full_desc: A cozy winter wreath in a forest style, combining the warmth of natural wood and the magic of festive evenings. The composition is created on a textured wooden base, decorated with selected forest cones, decorative twigs and delicate winter accents. This decor looks very authentic and fills the house with special peace, harmony and reminds of warm evenings by the fireplace.
features: Material: natural wooden elements, cones, eco-decor, strong base

wreathsCollected.title: Forest cones wreath
wreathsCollected.full_desc: Incredibly textured and rich interior wreath, made entirely of selected forest cones. The composition is 35 cm in diameter, which makes it a noticeable and at the same time neat accent on the wall or front door. Natural shapes, light gradients of brown shades and the texture of a real forest create a feeling of primordial harmony with nature. This wreath will be an ideal option for a cozy autumn-winter decor.
features: Material: 100% natural forest cones of different sizes, reliable eco-base
Advantages: solid construction, durable natural materials

wreathsCollected.title: Lavender wreath
wreathsCollected.full_desc: An exquisite and incredibly delicate interior wreath, inspired by the endless lavender fields of Provence. Thanks to the harmonious combination of delicate lilac inflorescences and realistic greenery on a natural vine, this product gives a feeling of peace, lightness and comfort. It will be a wonderful decoration for both the walls of a bedroom or living room, and for the front door, adding a sophisticated Mediterranean charm to the space.
features: Material: premium quality textile lavender (3D effect), decorative greenery, vine base

branches.title: Orchid branch
branches.full_desc: An elegant decorative orchid branch. With a length of 50 cm, it looks stunning in tall vases—either as a standalone minimalist accent or as a luxurious base for custom floral arrangements. The petal texture faithfully replicates the delicate feel of a real flower, yet the piece requires no complex maintenance and will delight you with its exquisite beauty every day.
features: Material: high-quality silk with a latex coating, flexible stem
Benefits: the stem is easy to bend and trim to fit the desired vase height

branches.title: Winter barberry
branches.full_desc: A bright and festive decorative branch of winter barberry, strewn with juicy white berries. Thanks to its compact length of 30 cm, it is an ideal element for filling Christmas vases, decorating a festive table or using as an accent in winter wreaths and compositions. The shine of the berries creates a wonderful contrast with pine needles or dried flowers, adding a special New Year's mood and dynamics to the interior.
features: Material: glossy eco-plastic (imitation of ripe berries), flexible wire base
Color: white, kaleidoscope of winter shine
Theme: Winter, New Year, Christmas decor

branches.title: Gypsophila branch
branches.full_desc: An incredibly light, airy and elegant decorative branch of gypsophila. Thanks to its lush inflorescences of small white flowers, it resembles a weightless cloud. The optimal length of 40 cm makes it a universal element: several such branches in a minimalist vase will create a delicate independent bouquet, and in combination with other flowers they will add volume and texture to any floral arrangement.
features: Material: premium quality textile, flexible and realistic stem

branches.title: Classic Barberry
branches.full_desc: An elegant, decorative classic barberry branch (50 cm long), designed to add vibrant, dynamic accents to your interior. Its graceful clusters of richly colored berries and flexible, realistic stem make it an ideal choice for tall vases, interior bouquets, or styling cozy corners of your home.
features: Length: 50 cm (extended format for tall vases)
Material: high-quality eco-plastic with a protective coating, flexible base
Usage: versatile all-season decor, floral arrangements

branches.title: Gold bead branch
branches.full_desc: A luxurious decorative branch adorned with exquisite gold beads that shimmer in the light. With its impressive 50 cm length and flexible structure, it serves as an ideal accent for festive interior décor. The branch looks stunning in tall vases and adds a touch of elegant sparkle to evergreen Christmas arrangements; it can also be used to decorate the Christmas tree or a holiday table, creating a truly magical atmosphere.
features: Material: metallic decorative beads, sturdy and flexible wire base

branches.title: Pink eucalyptus leaves
branches.full_desc: A unique and incredibly stylish decorative eucalyptus branch in an exclusive soft pink shade. Thanks to its impressive length of 70 cm, it is designed for tall floor or table vases and is able to independently transform the space. branches.title: Dried eucalyptus branch
branches.full_desc: Incredibly textured and tall decorative branch of dried eucalyptus. Ideal for massive floor vases and large-scale floral installations. Delicate matte shade and realistic texture of leaves perfectly recreate the aesthetics of real dried eucalyptus. branches.title: White lily branch

branches.full_desc: Lush and extremely realistic decorative branch. The rich golden color of the leaves with detailed veins and flexible structure allow you to easily model the direction of the branches. It is perfect for creating voluminous summer bouquets, will refresh any corner of the room and add juicy natural colors to the interior.

branches.title: Gold rose branch
branches.full_desc: An exquisite and luxurious decorative rose branch. Thanks to its solid length of 60 cm and elegant branches, it looks like a real work of art. branches.title: Autumn leaves

The deep palette of crimson, gold and terracotta shades surprisingly realistically recreates the beauty of fading autumn nature. branches.title: Silver oak leaves

butterflies.title: White-black butterfly
butterflies.full_desc: Stylish and graphic decorative butterfly in an expressive white-black design. Such a bold and at the same time classic combination makes it an ideal element for modern interior solutions, design of monochrome photo zones, as well as for adding clear visual accents to delicate or bright floral arrangements.
features: Material: lightweight flexible plastic with clear and high-quality two-tone printing
Color: contrasting white with expressive black pattern
Style: Graphic modern, Modern minimalism, Art deco, Contrast floristry

butterflies.title: Lilac butterfly
butterflies.full_desc: A delicate and incredibly romantic decorative butterfly in a sophisticated lilac shade. ] The soft color of the wings creates an atmosphere of a spring garden, comfort and Provencal peace. The butterfly will be an ideal addition to spring and summer floral arrangements, decoration of children's parties, decoration of textiles, curtains, holiday wreaths or as an accent element when wrapping gifts for creative individuals.
features: Style: Provence, Spring romanticism, Fabulous shabby chic

butterflies.title: Pink butterfly
butterflies.full_desc: The delicate pastel pink color of the wings makes it a great addition to delicate floral arrangements, children's photo zones, festive room decor or wedding accessories. It combines well with both white and rich berry or burgundy tones, adding volume and a sense of dynamics to the compositions.
features: Material: light flexible material with a silky texture of the wings
Style: Romantic shabby chic, Wedding pastel decor, Fairytale children's style

butterflies.title: Iridescent butterfly
butterflies.full_desc: A mesmerizing decorative butterfly with a fantastic holographic effect. With a classic size of 7 cm, this accessory is a real chameleon in the world of decor. It will be an ideal choice for ultra-modern photo zones, fabulous holiday installations, decorating extraordinary floral arrangements and adding a wow effect to any creative project.
features: Material: special flexible plastic with holographic application and glossy finish
Style: Futuristic chic, Fairytale glamour, Modern pop art, Enchanting decor

butterflies.title: Turquoise butterfly
butterflies.full_desc: A bright and incredibly refreshing decorative butterfly in an expressive turquoise shade. The rich color of the sea wave adds depth, coolness and sunny summer mood to the decor. It will become an accent in delicate white or cream bouquets, will perfectly complement modern photo zones in a marine or exotic style, and is also suitable for decorating interior wreaths.
features: Material: lightweight flexible material with high-quality saturated pigment, resistant to fading
Color: bright turquoise, sea wave color
Style: Tropical modern, Summer expressive decor, Contrast floristry

butterflies.title: Blue butterfly
butterflies.full_desc: Incredibly deep and mesmerizing decorative butterfly in a rich blue shade. The noble blue color adds special magnetism, depth and evening mystery to floral arrangements.
features: Material: lightweight flexible material with rich, fade-resistant pigment
Style: Noble modern, Contrast floristry, Fabulous evening decor

butterflies.title: Green butterfly
butterflies.full_desc: A refreshing and harmonious decorative butterfly in a juicy green shade. The pleasant green color of the wings allows it to perfectly mimic living leaves in bouquets or, conversely, become a stylish accent in monochrome compositions. This is an ideal choice for eco-weddings, decorating Easter and spring wreaths, as well as for fixing on indoor plants to create a cozy, lively mood.
features: Material: light flexible plastic or dense textile with imitation of natural veins
Style: Eco-naturalism, Spring renewal, Forest fairy tale decor

butterflies.title: Yellow butterfly
butterflies.full_desc: An incredibly bright, sunny and cheerful decorative butterfly that radiates warmth and positive energy. This is an ideal choice for creating bright children's photo zones, decorating spring and summer interior wreaths, festive table decoration and gift wrapping that should cause a sincere smile.
features: Material: lightweight flexible material with rich and fade-resistant solar pigment
Color: bright yellow, warm sunny shade
Style: Summer expressive decor, Cheerful country, Contrasting floristry

butterflies.title: Blue-yellow butterfly
butterflies.full_desc: Incredibly beautiful and deeply symbolic decorative butterfly in patriotic blue-yellow colors. It will be an ideal choice for creating thematic patriotic decor, decorating festive wreaths, decorating special bouquets, photo zones, as well as as a soulful accent in the interior of a home or office.
features: Material: lightweight flexible material with high-quality two-color printing and clear shade boundaries
Style: Patriotic modern, Symbolic decor, Contrasting accent floristry

butterflies.title: Light-purple butterfly
butterflies.full_desc: The light purple tone looks very noble and at the same time unobtrusive. It goes well with pink, white, silver, as well as contrasting yellow elements of floristry. Ideal for decorating holiday bouquets, creating airy interior decor, photo zones or elegant design of gift boxes.
features: Material: light flexible plastic or textured silky textile, resistant to creasing
Style: Charming romanticism, Elegant pastel decor, Fairytale floristry

ribbons.title: Gold thread
ribbons.full_desc: Gold lurex thread, created to add jewelry precision and luxurious shine to any creative project. With a width of 0.3 cm, this cord is strong, but at the same time flexible and docile in work. Suitable for tying mini-bouquets, fixing wedding invitations, hanging New Year's toys, creating elegant bows, as well as for finishing craft gift boxes.
features: Material: strong flexible cord with dense metallized lurex coating
Style: Festive minimalism, Premium Chic, Wedding Classics, Christmas Decor

ribbons.title: Cream organza ribbon
ribbons.full_desc: A delicate and translucent organza ribbon in a soft cream shade. This ribbon is a classic choice for wedding floristry, tying delicate pastel bouquets, decorating bonbonnieres, decorating candles, as well as for aesthetic gift decoration in the style of shabby chic or vintage.
features: Material: thin but durable translucent organza with neatly finished edges
Style: Wedding romanticism, Airy classics, French Provence, Vintage decor

ribbons.title: Khaki organza ribbon
ribbons.full_desc: A wide, translucent organza ribbon in a deep and noble shade of khaki. The complex earthy-olive color of khaki adds a special natural aesthetic, restraint and trendy style to the decor. This ribbon is an ideal choice for wrapping gifts in a natural range, decorating floral arrangements in an eco-style.
features: Material: translucent organza with high-quality dyeing and stable edge edging
Color: discreet khaki, natural olive green
Style: Eco-Naturalism, Modern Boho-Rustic, Scandinavian Minimalism

ribbons.title: Burgundy organza ribbon
ribbons.full_desc: An exquisite translucent organza ribbon in a deep, rich burgundy shade. This ribbon is ideal for adding passionate, dramatic or autumnal accents to floral bouquets, luxurious premium gift packaging, wedding decor in deep marsala tones, as well as for exquisite decoration of festive printing and candles.
features: Material: lightweight but durable translucent organza with a neat side seam fixation
Style: Classic premium chic, Gothic romanticism, Autumn floristry, Luxurious wedding

ribbons.title: Powder organza ribbon
ribbons.full_desc: Luxurious wide organza ribbon in an incredibly delicate powder shade. The soft pastel pink color of the powder adds special sophistication, girlish fragility and marshmallow lightness to the decor. It will be an impeccable choice for decorating large romantic bouquets, wedding decor, children's parties, as well as for exquisite and aesthetic packaging of premium gifts.
features: Material: thin, airy organza with a delicate silky shine and high-quality edging

ribbons.title: Red organza ribbon
ribbons.full_desc: Its vibrant red hue instantly draws the eye, adding a touch of festivity, passion, and a celebratory mood to any decor. This ribbon is perfect for romantic Valentine's Day gift wrapping, creating striking contrasts in wedding or event floral arrangements, and crafting vibrant Christmas and New Year decorations.
features: Material: Sheer, airy organza with rich, high-quality coloring and a durable edge
Style: Formal classic, festive expressionism, romantic chic, Christmas decor

ribbons.title: Powder organza ribbon
ribbons.full_desc: The soft pastel pink color of the powder adds a special romance, sophistication and girlish fragility to the decor. This ribbon is ideal for tying small elegant bouquets, decorating wedding printing and invitations, tying tags, as well as for aesthetic finishing packaging of neat gift boxes.
features: Material: thin, airy organza with a light silky sheen and a stable edge
Style: Romantic shabby chic, Wedding pastel decor, Chamber delicate floristry

ribbons.title: Pink organza ribbon
ribbons.full_desc: The ribbon holds its shape perfectly in small neat bows and knots, without weighing down the overall composition. It will be an ideal choice for decorating spring bouquets with tulips or peonies, wrapping cute gifts, decorating children's parties and creating stylish handmade accessories.
features: Material: light translucent organza with a neatly finished edge
Style: Romantic modern, Playful girlish chic, Spring floristry

ribbons.title: Chocolate organza ribbon
ribbons.full_desc: The warm color of chocolate adds a special sophistication, restraint and expensive finish to compositions and gifts. It is ideal for autumn floristry, packaging craft and gastronomic gifts (especially sweets or coffee sets), as well as for creating stylish interior decor in eco and rustic styles.
features: Material: translucent lightweight organza with high-quality, stable dyeing and a stable edge
Style: Eco-aesthetics, Cozy rustic, Coffee premium chic

ribbons.title: Sea wave satin ribbon
ribbons.full_desc: Incredibly luxurious and dense satin ribbon in a deep, magnetic sea wave color. The dense texture of the satin allows you to form flawless, clear and large bows that perfectly hold volume and enchant with a silky shimmer under the light. It will be an ideal choice for gift wrapping, floral arrangements, wedding decorations in a marine or emerald style, as well as for creating sophisticated interior accents.
features: Style: Modern Modern, Royal Classics, Exotic floristry

ribbons.title: Purple organza ribbon
ribbons.full_desc: This ribbon perfectly holds its lush shape, adding magical charm and visual volume to the design. It is ideal for creating contrasting accents in festive floristry, packaging special premium gifts, as well as for decorating thematic photo zones and wedding ceremonies in lavender or deep purple tones.
features: Material: weightless translucent organza with a delicate silky sheen and high-quality edge
Style: Mysterious romanticism, Magical chic, Festive extravaganza floristry

ribbons.title: Purple satin ribbon
ribbons.full_desc: Dense silky satin perfectly holds its shape, allowing you to create flawless, heavy and lush bows with a noble overflow on the folds. This ribbon will be an ideal choice for premium gift wrapping, solemn decoration of large floral arrangements, decoration of wedding halls and creation of elegant handmade accents.
features: Style: Royal classic, Premium chic, Wedding modern, Solemn decor

ribbons.title: Light-blue satin ribbon
ribbons.full_desc: A delicate and elegant satin ribbon in a light sky-blue shade. Silky satin holds its shape perfectly, allowing you to create lush, luxurious bows with a noble shimmer. This ribbon is an ideal choice for spring and winter floristry, the design of delicate bouquets for discharge from the maternity hospital (for boys), wedding decor in the style of 'something blue', as well as for aesthetic gift wrapping in pastel colors.
features: Style: Wedding romanticism, Spring freshness, Pastel Classic
